description: civilsupplieskerala.gov.in is the Kerala Civil Supplies and Consumer Affairs Department portal for ration-card services, public distribution information, and complaint handling. It links to public reporting and citizen-service web applications operated by the department.
summary: Public web-based HTTP surfaces only: an AePDS reporting site, a ration-card lookup/status site, and a grievance portal; no public OpenAPI/GraphQL/MCP/CLI or developer auth surface was found on civilsupplieskerala.gov.in.

surfaces.name: Ration Card Management System public lookup
